data.body:
Georgism would be a better answer. There should be a single tax, a tax on land values alone. Income tax discourages work, and sales tax discourages commerce, but those are productive activities.

A tax on land values is much better because no one created the land, and it can't be hidden.

data.body:
There are 4 main types you need to know:
• Text: For manual input (dates, IDs).
• Dropdown: For fixed selections.
• Combobox: Dropdown + manual edit.
• Multi-select: Pick multiple values at once.

data.body:
